_comment: First-party Quark compat (QUARKISLANDPLAN #71, Phase 1) — jasper + shale read well on the deepslate-bodied ancient mining island, plus a rare deep blue-corundum geode; and myalite on the End form. Extras only, no dedicated seed. Inert without Quark (unknown ores are skipped before any RNG).

biome_overrides._comment: End form: myalite veins the end-stone island (see quark_rocky.json). Empty-biomes + dimension the_end selector-merges into ancient's base End band.
